holdings.infoBox: BRIF is an equity ETF with a total of 49 individual holdings. The top holdings are NVIDIA stock at 8.17%, Broadcom at 5.44%, First American Treasury Obligations Fund Class X at 4.33%, Palo Alto Networks at 4.18%, and Eli Lilly and Company at 3.99%.

overview.description: The FIS Bright Portfolios Focused Equity ETF (BRIF) is an exchange-traded fund that mostly invests in large cap equity. The fund actively selects US large-cap stocks based the advisers definition of upholding Christian values combined with an assessment for growth at a reasonable price. BRIF was launched on Dec 20, 2024 and is issued by Faith Investor Services.
